raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad faẓẓija wiṅsch : Zell
man to preefscha / ka es no tawa
Medijuma ehnu / mans Dehls /
adeht / ka manna Dwehfele tew
wehti / un tas zehle wiṅnam
reekscha / un wiṅsch ehde / un tas
tneffe wiṅnam Wihnu / un wiṅsch
sehre.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiṅna Tehws Ihsāiks
faẓẓija us to : Nahz jelle fehur /
n fuhpsti mann / mans Dehls.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Jehkabs peegahje un
uhpstija winnu / un wiṅsch fa-
de wiṅza Drebbju Smarschu /
i swehtijs to : Un wiṅsch faẓẓi-
: Reds / ta Smarscha manna
ehla irr ka ta Lauka Smarscha /
tas KUNGS swehtijs irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Laid tad Deews tew dohd
tahs Debbes Rastas / un no
hs Semmes Treknuna / un
uds Labbibas / un Wihna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Lanschu Pultki laid tew
po / un Landis lai klannijahs
efsch tew / eṣṭi weens Kungs
r taweem Brahteem / un ta-
s Mahtes Behrni lai preefsch
klannijahs / nolahdehts lai
kas tew nolahd / un kas tew
hti / tas lai irr swehtihts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad Ihsāiks pabeidse /
kabu swehtiht / un Jehkabs
bij isgahjis no fawa Tehwa
āka / tad nahze Eesaws / wiṅ-
Brahlis / no fawas Meddi-
nas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas fatattija arridsan
us Wirrumus / un nesfe tohs
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "faẓẓija us fawu Tehwu : Zellees /
mans Tehws / un ehd no tawa
Dehla Meddijuma / tapehz / ka
tawa Dwehfele mann swehti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad faẓẓija Ihsāiks / wiṅ-
na Tehws us to : kas effi tu ? un
tas faẓẓija : es esinu taws Dehls /
taws Pirmdsimtajs Eesaws.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad istruhzinajahs Ihsāiks ar Bahrbihjafchanu war-
ren kohti / un faẓẓija : Kas ? kur tas
Meddineeks / kas man jaw atneffe
un es efinu ehdis no wiṣa / pirins
tu effi nahzis / un es efinu winnu
swehtijs / tas arridsan swehtihts
buhs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad Eesaws fawa Tehwa
Wahrds dsirdeja / isfauzahs tas
leelā Sauffschanā / un noskuninte
pahrleeku / un faẓẓija us fawu
Tehwu / swehti mann arridsan /
mans Tehws.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiṅsch faẓẓija : Taws
Brahlis irr nahzis ar Wistu / un
tawu Swehtumu paṙehmis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas faẓẓija : Teefchain
tohp winna Wahrds Jehkabs no-
faukts / ka tas nu mann ohtru
reisi appaksh Kahjahin minnis /
mannu Pirmdsimtibu irr wiṅsch
nehmis / un redsi / nu xemin wiṅsch
mannu Swehtumu / un tas faẓẓ-
ija : Negg effi tu wehl weenn
Swehtumu preefsch man atlizzi-
najis ?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Ihsāiks atbildeja / un
faẓẓija us Eesawu : Reds / es esinu
winan par Kungu zehlis pahr
tew / un wiṅus winna Brahtus
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
